**Commit**: `0941ce83a17b` — feat(m4): convert all 8 exercises to R10 directory structure

**Body**:

Per-technique files with 5-phase narrative.

Exercises:
  ex_1: 5 files (K-means, hierarchical, density-based, spectral, evaluation)
  ex_2: 4 files (EM from scratch, sklearn GMM, covariance types, MoE)
  ex_3: 5 files (PCA, Kernel PCA, t-SNE, UMAP, comparison)
  ex_4: 4 files (statistical, IForest, LOF, ensemble)
  ex_5: 4 files (Apriori, FP-Growth, rule eval, rule features)
  ex_6: 5 files (TF-IDF/BM25, NMF, LDA, BERTopic, sentiment)
  ex_7: 5 files (content, user-CF, item-CF, MF, hybrid)
  ex_8: 5 files (XOR proof, activations/init, CNN, optimisers, regularisation)

Total: 37 technique files × 3 formats + 8 shared modules.
Helpers in shared/mlfp04/ex_N.py.
